name: ST JOE Co
summary: The St. Joe Company is a diversified real estate development, asset management, and operating company incorporated in Florida in 1936. It owns approximately 165,000 acres in Northwest Florida and operates across three segments: residential (homesite development and sales), hospitality (hotels, Watersound Club, vacation rentals, marinas, food and beverage), and commercial (multi-family, senior living, self-storage, medical, office, retail, industrial leasing, and timber management). It also operates real estate brokerage, title insurance, and insurance agency businesses.
